summary: External MU directory profile sync on OTP login validated end-to-end. Backend (5/5 pytest + 5 regression updates in test_login_methods.py): POST /api/auth/otp/verify {phone:9133430919, code:123456} returns 200 with enriched user {name:'Rock Star Yash', role:'staff', qid:'MUCS272', gender:'Male', type:'Staff', phone:'9133430919', designated_locations:[]} and valid JWT; GET /api/auth/me with that token echoes the same enriched fields including designated_locations; UNKNOWN phone 9999999999 (and seeded 9876500010, 1112223334) now correctly BLOCKS login with HTTP 404 'No MU profile found for this mobile number.' (no more silent fallback to primary student); wrong code (000000) returns HTTP 401 'Incorrect OTP...'; role mapping Staff -> 'staff' confirmed. Regression: password login (faculty) and Microsoft mock SSO still return 200. Frontend (mobile 390x844): OTP flow on /login with 9133430919 + 123456 lands on Home; Home greeting renders 'Good Evening, Rock!' (uses first name from the enriched profile); Profile screen PROFILE DETAILS card shows QID=MUCS272, Type=Staff, Gender=Male, Phone=+91 9133430919, with avatar 'RS' and full name 'Rock Star Yash' in header (email mucs272@mahindrauniversity.edu.in synthesised by backend); Mark Attendance (/modules/attendance) renders AUTHORIZED LOCATIONS section listing the configured geofences (Mahindra University - Main Campus 500m, MU Corporate Office 200m, Work From Home, MU Research Park 300m, etc.) because designated_locations is empty — fallback path works without errors. No red screens, no API errors, designated_locations field present in /auth/me payload. Deprecated packages detected: none new (carryover RN-Web shadow*/pointerEvents warnings only).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, use 'boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (clay.* recipes).

test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/test_login_methods.py (updated: 2 OTP cases now assert 404 block instead of student fallback)
action_items: [INFO] No fixes required for this iteration's feature. External MU profile sync works correctly; blocking behavior on unknown phone matches the PRD.
[LOW / carryover] Replace shadow* props with boxShadow in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts and move pointerEvents into style to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.

[INFO] Seeded demo phones (9876500010 etc.) in DEMO_PHONES dict are now dead weight — the OTP flow no longer uses them since it queries the external MU directory. Consider removing DEMO_PHONES and the phone backfill in on_startup() to avoid confusion (server.py:177-186, 249-253).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:_sync_external_profile correctly raises proper HTTPException codes for every failure path: 504 (timeout), 502 (network/5xx/invalid json/missing QID), 404 (no data), 403 (unsupported type). Blocking login on failure is exactly what the PRD asks for.
Mongo upsert keyed by phone with $setOnInsert {id, created_at} keeps the same user_id stable across re-logins — good for attendance history continuity.

Synthesised email '{qid}@mahindrauniversity.edu.in' when mail_id is absent (server.py:458) is sensible. Note: if the external directory later returns mail_id for the same phone, the email field will be updated, which may break the unique index on email if another user already has it. Low risk but worth noting.
Profile screen (frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx) renders QID, Type, Gender, Phone, plus the synthesised email — exactly the PRD-specified fields.

Mark Attendance (frontend/app/modules/attendance.tsx) correctly handles empty designated_locations by falling back to the configured geofences from /api/attendance/geofences — no crash, no empty section.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_external_profile_sync.py (new — 5 tests covering enriched OTP login, unknown-phone block, wrong-code 401, password & MS regression)
/app/backend/tests/test_login_methods.py (updated — replaced obsolete unknown-phone-fallback test with two 404-blocking assertions)

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 new tests; 1 obsolete regression test replaced with 2 block-assertion tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (OTP -> Home greeting -> Profile (QID/Type/Gender/Phone all visible) -> Mark Attendance authorized locations all verified)

seed_data_creation: MongoDB users collection now contains an upserted user with phone=9133430919, qid=MUCS272, role=staff (Rock Star Yash) — created by the live external profile fetch. Not test pollution; this is the production behaviour.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://decoupled-frontend.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Known external MU profile phones for OTP login: 9133430919 (Rock Star Yash, MUCS272, Staff). Unknown phone for block test: 9999999999 -> 404. Wrong code: any 6-digit != 123456 -> 401. Demo phone numbers in DEMO_PHONES are NO LONGER usable for OTP login (e.g. 9876500010 now returns 404 because the external directory has no record). Frontend OTP test selectors verified: [data-testid='phone-input', 'send-otp-button', 'otp-input', 'verify-otp-button']. Profile testIDs to look for were not strictly needed; the PROFILE DETAILS card renders all 4 fields plainly in the DOM.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs reproduced. The feature works as specified.
